title: Refined Paintings
body:
!["Refined Paintings" by CheckMC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54f859e28fcd66cfcb64511541a4454b8f0a49d6.png)

# [This mod requires Cardinal Components API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cardinal-components-api/version/6.1.0) (and also the fabric api)

![Dyeable Painting Frames: Minecraft painting + a dye = the painting with a green frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b1baa96b285d815059c2724786dabcc8fbac65d.png)

## Use a brush to cycle through available painting variants.
![A player uses a brush item on a painting to change it's variant, while the painting name and author appears in the action bar..](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a05473950dccfcf445687051a393f38e32f5ca79.gif)


## **New Paintings**
Refined Paintings adds several new paintings for you to decorate with.
![Several new paintings by various artists](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/996ee5c18e81ddac29cd610206d6f702a191b6f8.png)
# **Credits**
Programming: CheckMC, [Calverin](https://github.com/Calverin)

Art: CheckMC, Miffen Kop, ChipChase, TheWorfer27

# **Future**
I planned to update this mod, but college has taken up a majority of my time. The code is available on github if you would like to modify / update it - feel free to release forks if desired, I just ask you link back here and credit me.
